clinical_validity.rationale: Clinical plan remains stable while local-first constraints reduce unsafe provider assumptions.

psychometric_defensibility.rationale: Mock-first deterministic runs strengthen trace and review reproducibility.

technical_feasibility.rationale: Current hardware and missing tools are explicitly documented, improving feasibility discipline.

architecture_coherence.rationale: Provider and runtime boundaries are clearer after local-first revision.

security_privacy.rationale: No-cloud default reduces third-party data-flow risk.

ux_workflow_fit.rationale: No major UX change; local voice is kept optional until it can improve rather than destabilize the experience.

cost_performance_efficiency.rationale: Cloud spend is removed from the baseline plan and local runtime costs are gated.

open_source_sustainability.rationale: Model/runtime license records are now explicit inputs to local adoption.

market_gtm_strength.rationale: Local-first demos support privacy-sensitive buyers while preserving future provider options.

evidence_discipline.rationale: The iteration adds concrete local hardware evidence and separates proven facts from planned spikes.

implementation_readiness.rationale: Baseline implementation no longer depends on uninstalled optional runtimes.

adversarial_robustness.rationale: Adversarial review removed hidden dependencies on local AI and asset tools.

legal_regulatory_resilience.rationale: Synthetic voice and model provenance risks are now governance-gated.

specialty_clinical_generalizability.rationale: No specialty regression; local runtime decisions are orthogonal to case review.

critical_risks.summary: Local model and voice quality may be insufficient for realistic clinical actor behavior.

evidence_debt.summary: Install and benchmark MLX or llama.cpp with a small Qwen/DeepSeek model on target hardware.
Install and benchmark VibeVoice-Realtime only after safety and license review.

decision_debt.summary: Choose MLX LM or llama.cpp as the first local model runtime spike.

summary: Iteration 0004 improves feasibility by grounding the plan in actual local hardware and making cloud-free mock providers the baseline.
